item.title: Why ADHD Brains Struggle to Start Big Tasks
item.description: A brief look at how ADHD can affect task initiation, motivation, and mental overwhelm, making large or complex tasks feel more difficult to begin and manage.

media:content.media:title: Why ADHD Brains Struggle to Start Big Tasks
media:content.media:description: A brief look at how ADHD can affect task initiation, motivation, and mental overwhelm, making large or complex tasks feel more difficult to begin and manage.

item.title: What ADHD Brains Tend to Crave
item.description: A look at why ADHD brains may seek stimulation over stability, based on Sasha Hamdani, MD’s perspective.

media:content.media:title: What ADHD Brains Tend to Crave
media:content.media:description: A look at why ADHD brains may seek stimulation over stability, based on Sasha Hamdani, MD’s perspective.

item.title: ADHD and PMDD: What the Link Means
item.description: A discussion of research suggesting people with ADHD may be 3-4 times more likely to have PMDD. Do you agree?

media:content.media:title: ADHD and PMDD: What the Link Means
media:content.media:description: A discussion of research suggesting people with ADHD may be 3-4 times more likely to have PMDD. Do you agree?
